Overview News Publications Career Contact
Academic Profile

Hyung-Seok Oh

Integrated M.S.&Ph.D Student · Department of Artificial Intelligence · Korea University, Seoul, South Korea

I am an integrated M.S. & Ph.D. student in the Department of Artificial Intelligence at Korea University. My research centers on speech generation and affective speech modeling, with particular interests in speech synthesis, neural vocoders, voice conversion, generative models, and affective computing.

Papers 13
Projects 4
Awards 1
Email Google Scholar PRML Github
Research Focus

Speech Generation and Affective Speech Modeling

Overview

I am an integrated M.S. & Ph.D. student in the Department of Artificial Intelligence at Korea University. My research centers on speech generation and affective speech modeling, with particular interests in speech synthesis, neural vocoders, voice conversion, generative models, and affective computing.

Primary Areas

Speech synthesis Affective speech modeling Voice conversion Generative models Affective computing

2026
Our Paper accepted to ICLR 2026.
2025
Received AI Frontier Challenge Excellence Award.
2023
Worked as Machine Learning Researcher Intern at NAVER Cloud.
